name: Espresso
details: Rich aromatic coffee brewed from premium roasted beans delivering bold flavor smooth texture warm aroma and energizing experience perfect for starting the day.

name: Cappuccino
details: Smooth creamy coffee blended with fresh milk creating balanced taste delightful aroma comforting warmth and enjoyable experience loved by coffee drinkers everywhere.

name: Latte
details: Delicious latte coffee prepared using fresh espresso and steamed milk offering mild flavor silky texture pleasant aroma and relaxing taste perfect for daily enjoyment.

name: Americano
details: Classic americano coffee made by adding hot water to espresso creating smooth balanced taste light body pleasant aroma and refreshing experience for coffee lovers.

name: Mocha
details: Sweet mocha coffee blended with chocolate syrup espresso and steamed milk producing creamy texture delightful aroma rich flavor and dessert like coffee experience.

name: Cold Brew
details: Cold brew coffee slowly steeped in cold water for hours producing smooth taste low acidity natural sweetness refreshing texture and enjoyable drink during warm days.

name: Flat White
details: Flat white coffee crafted with rich espresso and silky microfoam milk creating velvety texture balanced taste mild aroma and smooth enjoyable coffee drinking experience.

name: Macchiato
details: Macchiato coffee featuring bold espresso topped with small layer of steamed milk creating strong flavor smooth finish rich aroma and authentic Italian coffee style.

name: Iced Latte
details: Refreshing iced latte prepared with chilled espresso milk and ice cubes delivering smooth creamy taste cool sensation delightful aroma perfect drink for warm afternoons.

name: Caramel Latte
details: Caramel latte coffee blended with sweet caramel syrup fresh milk and espresso creating creamy texture sweet flavor delightful aroma and satisfying dessert style beverage.

name: Hazelnut Coffee
details: Hazelnut flavored coffee made with premium roasted beans producing nutty aroma smooth taste balanced sweetness and delicious comforting drink for relaxing coffee moments.

name: Irish Coffee
details: Traditional Irish coffee combining hot coffee creamy topping and smooth flavor delivering rich aroma warm sensation delightful taste and classic beverage loved worldwide.

name: Vanilla Latte
details: Vanilla latte coffee infused with sweet vanilla syrup steamed milk and espresso creating creamy flavor smooth aroma comforting taste and delightful coffee experience.

name: Affogato
details: Affogato dessert coffee featuring hot espresso poured over creamy vanilla ice cream producing rich flavor sweet aroma smooth texture and indulgent treat.

name: Turkish Coffee
details: Traditional Turkish coffee brewed using finely ground beans creating strong flavor thick texture rich aroma and authentic cultural coffee experience.

name: Vietnamese Coffee
details: Vietnamese coffee prepared with strong brew and sweet condensed milk producing bold flavor creamy texture rich aroma and refreshing drink.

name: Nitro Coffee
details: Nitro cold brew coffee infused with nitrogen creating smooth creamy texture cascading foam mild sweetness refreshing taste and modern specialty coffee experience.

name: Cortado
details: Cortado coffee made with equal parts espresso and warm milk producing balanced flavor smooth texture rich aroma and delightful Spanish coffee style.

name: Ristretto
details: Ristretto espresso shot prepared with limited water delivering concentrated flavor strong aroma thick texture and intense coffee experience.

name: Frappuccino
details: Frappuccino blended iced coffee drink mixed with milk ice and sweet syrup creating creamy texture refreshing taste and enjoyable dessert style beverage.
